title: Janel Guerrero
compiled_truth: Janel Guerrero is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-03), Janel Guerrero sent 138 and received 1553 emails, totalling 1691 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (81), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (75), [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (51), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (42), [Karen Denne](people/karen-denne) (42). Mailbox folders observed: compliments, deleted_items, inbox, internet_sites, new_england_ny, notre_dame.
